suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDC #179 with explicit expectation to decide at this call. Already implemented and tested since devnet-1, making it a straightforward decision.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8080 DFI decision (exits use consolidation queue)
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDC #179 with explicit expectation to decide at this call. Intent to DFI was stated, requiring formal confirmation.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8148 review and Hegota inclusion decision (custom sweep threshold)
suggestions.rationale: Client teams were asked to review before this call and bring data on affected Lido validator count. Proposed for Hegota (PFI) in ACDC #179, needs stage progression decision.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-4/5 status and path to stability
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-4 has been unstable since Monday before ACDC #179. Devnet-5 was planned to relaunch with same spec, with no scope increase until two weeks of stability achieved. Critical blocker for fork progress.

Potuz flagged potential bug where clients may not correctly set data-available flag before deadline (ACDC #179). CL teams were asked to notify when dual-deadline and honest-reorg features are implemented for testing.

suggestions.topic: Builder API V4 and devnet-6 scope planning
suggestions.rationale: Builder API changes (produce block V4) targeted for devnet-6, contingent on devnet-5 achieving two weeks of stability. If stability is achieved, next devnet scope needs discussion.
Presented in ACDC #178 with request for review of updated PR #11604. No feedback discussion found in ACDC #179, but this is informational and can be handled async.

suggestions.topic: ACDC meeting time permanent change decision
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #180 is trialing 11:00 UTC start time to accommodate AEST participants. Decision needed whether to revert to original time for #181 or adopt new time permanently.
